name: AWS SageMaker Endpoint Configuration Created With Disable Data Capture Config
description: Creation of an Amazon SageMaker endpoint configuration with data capture disabled can hinder the ability to monitor and audit model performance. Ensuring data capture is enabled is crucial for tracking usage and maintaining operational oversight.

rules.name: AWS SageMaker Endpoint Configuration Created With Disable Data Capture Config

author: Sunil Bharti and Yash Verma
